user.title: OpenVPN Manager Setup
user.description:
**Before continuing:**
1. Install and start the OpenVPN Manager add-on
2. Make sure it's running (Settings → Add-ons → OpenVPN Manager)

**After this setup:**
You'll need to upload your .ovpn file. Instructions will be shown after clicking Submit.

upload.title: Upload VPN Configuration
upload.description:
**Next step: Upload your .ovpn file**

You can upload via:

**Option 1 - Add-on File Browser:**
1. Settings → Add-ons → OpenVPN Manager → Files
2. Navigate to /data/configs/
3. Upload your .ovpn file

**Option 2 - Terminal/SSH:**
```
curl -X POST -F "file=@your-config.ovpn" http://homeassistant.local:9876/api/upload
```

After uploading, toggle the VPN switch in your dashboard!

error.cannot_connect:
Cannot connect to OpenVPN Manager add-on.

Please verify:
- Add-on is installed and running
- API host/port are correct
- Check add-on logs for errors
